raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija wiſcha: Pa-
leez kluffu manna Meita/ kamehr
tu ſinni/ ka fchi Leeta tsdohfees/
jo tas Wihrs ne buhs ar Meern/
pirms wiſsch fcho Leetu ſchodeen
buhs pagallam nobeidsis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta IV. Nodalla.
Boas nahk preekſch Teefas ar Elimeleka tu-
waku Mantas.rehmeiu/ Naemjas un Ruttes
Tihruma pehz: r. Kad nu ſchis fawu Teesu
pamett/ un atſtahjahs: 6. Tad xem Boas
Rutti par Seewu: 10. Ta dſemde winnam
Obedu Dahwida Leeu.Tehwu: 17. Dahi-
wida un Peereza Raddu.Rafsti: 18.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N Boas gahje Wahr-
tis/ un apſehdehs tur/
un reds/ tas tuwaks
Rads/no ka Boas btj runnajs/
gahje fezzen/ tad fazzija wiſsch:
Nahz/ apſehdees tche kur/ un
wiſsch nahze un apſehdehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſsch nehme deſmits
Wihrus no ta Pilsjahta Wezza-
jeem/ un fazzija : Apſehdeetees
ſcheitan/ un tee apſehdehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztja wiſsch us to
Tuwu-Raddu : To Tihruma
Gabbatu/ kas muhfain Brahtam
Elimelekam peederreja/ grib Na-
emja/ kas no Moaba Seunes
atnahkuſſ/ pahrdohf.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es apnehnohs to tew
peeſazzibt/ un fazzibt: pirz to/ to
Eedsihwotaju Preekscha/un man-
no Lauschu Wezzaju Preekscha/
gribbi tu to pirkt/ tad pirz/ bet
ja tu ne pirksi/ tad faeki man to/
ka es to ſinnu/ jo zitta newaid/
kam nahkahs to pirkt/ bes ween
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Boas fazzija: Kurra-
Deend tu to Tihrumu no Na-
emjas pirz/ tad buhs tew arridsa-
Rutti to Moabiterent/ ta Nomir-
rufcha Seewn prezzeht/ zeldame-
tam Nomirrufcham weenu
Wahrdn pahr wiſcha Jhpa-
ſchumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas tuwa-
Rads: Es ne warreschu to preekſ-
mann pirkt/ ka es fawu thpasch-
Teesu ne maitaju/ pirz tu/ ka-
man nahkahs pirkt/ jo es ne war-
ru to atpirkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu bija tas wezzos Laikō-
Teeta eekſch Israēta pee tahs At-
pirkschanas un pee Jsdoſschanas-
ka wiffa Teefa apsitprinata tap-
tu/ tad iſwilke tas Wihrs jaw-
Kurpi/ un dewe to fawant Tu-
wakam/ un tas bija par Leezib-
eekſch Israēta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija fchis tuwa-
Rads us Boafu: Pirz tu preekſ-
tewim/ un iſwilke fawu Kurpt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztja Boas us teen
Wezzajeem/ un us wiſſeem Lau-
dim: Juhs ſchodeen effat Leez-
neeki/ ka es wiffu efmu pirzis
kas Elimelekam/ un wiffu/ ka-
Kilionam un Mahlonam bijis iru-
no Naemjas Rohkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un arridsan Rutti to Mo-
abiterenti/ Mahlona Seewu/ pre-
zeschit es few par Seewu/ ze-
dants tam Nomirrufcham ween-
Wahrdn pahr wiſcha Jhpaſchu-
nu/ ka ta Nomirrufcha Wahrd-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
